item.title: This is so trippy! Crazy Fat Putter Red Couse match - Hole 4
item.description: A look at a wild Fat Putter mini golf match on Red Course Hole 4, highlighting tricky shots, fun moments, and the challenge of a hole-in-one.

media:content.media:title: This is so trippy! Crazy Fat Putter Red Couse match - Hole 4
media:content.media:description: A look at a wild Fat Putter mini golf match on Red Course Hole 4, highlighting tricky shots, fun moments, and the challenge of a hole-in-one.

item.title: Disney Fantasia Mini Golf: Holes 10-12
item.description: Join the fun on Holes 10-12 of the Disney Fantasia mini golf course. Watch creative shots, challenging obstacles, and hole-in-one attempts in this magical round.

media:content.media:title: Disney Fantasia Mini Golf: Holes 10-12
media:content.media:description: Join the fun on Holes 10-12 of the Disney Fantasia mini golf course. Watch creative shots, challenging obstacles, and hole-in-one attempts in this magical round.

item.title: Taking On The 1959 Golf Course: Let's Play
item.description: Stepping onto the 1959 golf course for a full round — a look at what makes this classic layout so unique and worthy of a closer look.

media:content.media:title: Taking On The 1959 Golf Course: Let's Play
media:content.media:description: Stepping onto the 1959 golf course for a full round — a look at what makes this classic layout so unique and worthy of a closer look.

item.title: Don't touch the lava on this wild mini golf course
item.description: A mini golf course with a lava twist — this creative and imaginative build turns a backyard into an adventure where one wrong move means lava.

media:content.media:title: Don't touch the lava on this wild mini golf course
media:content.media:description: A mini golf course with a lava twist — this creative and imaginative build turns a backyard into an adventure where one wrong move means lava.

item.title: Congo River Mini Golf: Holes 4-6
item.description: Watch Holes 4-6 of the Congo River mini golf course. Fun challenges, precise shots, and exciting hole-in-one attempts make this a thrilling match to follow.

media:content.media:title: Congo River Mini Golf: Holes 4-6
media:content.media:description: Watch Holes 4-6 of the Congo River mini golf course. Fun challenges, precise shots, and exciting hole-in-one attempts make this a thrilling match to follow.

item.title: EPIC Homemade Mini Golf Course!
item.description: Why go out when you can build your own? This epic homemade mini golf course proves that with a little creativity, anything is possible.

media:content.media:title: EPIC Homemade Mini Golf Course!
media:content.media:description: Why go out when you can build your own? This epic homemade mini golf course proves that with a little creativity, anything is possible.

item.title: Elisha and Her Lucky 13
item.description: Watch Elisha take on her “Lucky 13” challenge. Exciting moments, skillful play, and fun surprises make this a memorable and entertaining experience.

media:content.media:description: Watch Elisha take on her “Lucky 13” challenge. Exciting moments, skillful play, and fun surprises make this a memorable and entertaining experience.

item.title: Wild Congo River Mini Golf: Holes 10-11
item.description: Watch a thrilling mini golf match on the Congo River course. Holes 10-11 bring tricky shots, fun challenges, and exciting putts for a hole-in-one attempt.

media:content.media:description: Watch a thrilling mini golf match on the Congo River course. Holes 10-11 bring tricky shots, fun challenges, and exciting putts for a hole-in-one attempt.

item.title: WOW! Did We Just Hit a Hole-in-One Record?
item.description: Watch an incredible golf moment as this creator attempts a record-breaking hole-in-one. Excitement, skill, and suspense all unfold on the course.

media:content.media:title: WOW! Did We Just Hit a Hole-in-One Record?
media:content.media:description: Watch an incredible golf moment as this creator attempts a record-breaking hole-in-one. Excitement, skill, and suspense all unfold on the course.

item.title: Congo River Mini Golf: Hole 9
item.description: Watch the action on Hole 9 of the Congo River mini golf course. Exciting shots, tricky angles, and a fun challenge for putting enthusiasts and fans of hole-in-one attempts.

media:content.media:description: Watch the action on Hole 9 of the Congo River mini golf course. Exciting shots, tricky angles, and a fun challenge for putting enthusiasts and fans of hole-in-one attempts.

item.title: Congo River Mini Golf: Holes 7-8
item.description: Join the fun on Holes 7-8 of the Congo River mini golf course. Watch skillful shots, challenging obstacles, and attempts at hole-in-ones unfold.
